source_name: Code4rena Nudge.xyz Findings and Analysis Report (2025-03) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_claim: Missing UUID uniqueness validation in campaign deployment
why_it_looked_bad: NudgeCampaignFactory does not enforce uniqueness of campaign UUIDs in deployCampaign or deployAndFundCampaign. CREATE2 may still produce unique addresses because other salt inputs differ, but duplicated UUIDs can confuse off-chain tracking, analytics, or integrations that rely on UUID as a unique identifier.
why_not_valid: admin/configuration issue should not be escalated without untrusted reachability or direct reward-loss mechanics
downgrade_reason: admin/configuration issue should not be escalated without untrusted reachability or direct reward-loss mechanics
trust_assumption: Treat as a caution/false-positive reference unless the current target shows permissionless reachability, direct value loss, and concrete affected code path.
when_it_could_be_real: if UUIDs are used for authorization, reward attribution, or settlement outside the contract
if integrators treat UUID as a unique primary key
if campaign creation is delegated to untrusted parties
